name: Summer Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange tomato slices on salad plates.
2. Layer a few onion rings on top of the tomatoes.
3. Sprinkle with basil or parsley and a dash of pepper.
4. Mix lemon juice with oil and spoon over each serving.
Food Exchanges per Serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 66; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 9g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 15mg; FAT: 4g
